meta.title: News | PikFun
meta.description: Latest PikFun news, court & event updates, and pickleball tips and guides.

list.empty: No articles yet. Please publish events or knowledge articles on WordPress.
list.emptyFiltered: There are no articles in this category yet.

magazine.tagline: A media hub inspiring pickleball culture
magazine.relatedLead: You may also like these articles

submissionForm.title: Title
submissionForm.titlePlaceholder: Example: Weekend open play in Xinzhuang — beginners welcome!
submissionForm.instagramDescription: Paste links to public posts or Reels. They will appear below the article after publication. Up to 6.
submissionForm.reviewDescription: Your post will be reviewed by the PikFun team and will appear in News after approval.
submissionForm.postTypeHelp: Event posts may use the Events type. Coach and court owner types are enabled according to your approved role.
submissionForm.excerptPlaceholder: A short description shown on article cards (optional; generated from the content if left blank)
submissionForm.submitted: Submitted for review. It will appear in News after approval.
submissionForm.approvedEditNotice: This article is currently published. Your changes will be reviewed again and made public after approval.
submissionForm.noPermissionDesc: After your partner application is approved (coach, court owner, or host), you can publish articles that appear in News.
submissionForm.emptyPosts: No posts yet. Click "New Post" to write your first article.

errors.contentTooShort: Content must contain at least 10 characters
errors.videoTypeInvalid: Only MP4, WebM, and MOV videos are supported
errors.coverTypeInvalid: Please upload an image (JPG, PNG, WebP, or GIF)
errors.instagramDuplicate: This Instagram post has already been added
errors.instagramMax: You can add up to 6 Instagram posts
errors.instagramEmpty: Please paste an Instagram post URL
errors.instagramInvalidUrl: Invalid URL. Please use a complete link (including https://)
errors.instagramStoriesUnsupported: Stories are not supported. Please use a public post or Reels URL
errors.instagramProfileUrl: This looks like a profile URL. Please use a post (/p/…) or Reels (/reel/…) link
errors.instagramNeedPostOrReel: Please paste a public post or Reels URL, e.g. https://www.instagram.com/p/xxxxx/ or /reel/xxxxx/

submissionForm.editorPlaceholder: Share class highlights, event details, or tips for fellow players…

knowledge.cta: Have knowledge to share? Submit now

author.defaultBioTemplate: {{name}} is a PikFun-verified {{role}}, sharing group play, events, and course information to help more players find the right venues and partners.

like.prompt: Found this article helpful? Give the author a like

comments.title: Comments
comments.invite: Feel free to share your thoughts and photos
comments.placeholder: Share your thoughts, questions or experience…
comments.emptyPrompt: Be the first to share your experience!
